title: Curious Armor Stands
description: Allows armor stands to display curios
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ochotonida/curious-armor-stands/HEAD/src/main/resources/logo.png "")

Curious armor stands is a simple mod that allows armor stands to equip and display curios. 

A curio can be equipped by right-clicking it on the armor stand. If the curio is marked as 'hands', 'bracelet' or 'ring', the arms of the armor stand will be automatically enabled when equipped. A curio can be unequipped by right-clicking the armor stand again with an empty hand. Held items and armor will be unequipped first. Armor stands have 8 curio slots.

This mod requires [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios ""). (obviously)
